name: @skelm/package-publisher
description: Validate self-test entries, secret-scan, and publish-dry-run skelm workflow packages.

workflows.description: Validate, secret-scan, self-test entry-check, and publish-dry-run a target workflow package.

packageDir.description: Absolute path to the workflow-package directory to check.

runSelfTest.description: Validate the target package's declared self-test entry without executing it.
